zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Beaupine於1353年出生在英國瓦維其可爾伍頓 瓦文時，她的父親Thomas Beaupenny Burgess Of Parliament27歲，母親Agnes De Lamore21歲。她和John Harewell至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1419年在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾伍頓 瓦文。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Beaupine was born in 1353, in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, England, her father, Thomas Beaupenny Burgess Of Parliament, was 27 and her mother, Agnes De Lamore, was 21. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with John Harewell. She died in 1419, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Beaupine est née en 1353, à Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Beaupenny Burgess Of Parliament, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes De Lamore, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec John Harewell. Elle est décédée en 1419, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Beaupineが1353年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウットオン ワウンで生まれた時，父Thomas Beaupenny Burgess Of Parliamentは27歳，母Agnes De Lamoreは21歳であった。彼女はJohn Harewellとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1419年に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアウットオン ワウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Beaupine(이)가 1353년 영국 워윅실르 보턴 와웬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Beaupenny Burgess Of Parliament(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes De Lamore(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 John Harewell(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 보턴 와웬에 묻혔다.
